final_prompt.prompt:
Create a promotional marketing poster for a 跨境电商 campaign with a complex but structured visual composition.

Style/medium: needs a bold, graphic-design-forward promotional aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be 16:9 horizontal layout; must include layered typography stacking with a product or hero subject physically overlapping and partially obscuring the text layers
Subject: must include a product or hero subject as the focal element that overlaps the typographic layers
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a high-energy promotional atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a vibrant, attention-grabbing direction — exact hues and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include decorative art-lettering / display type as a primary design element (content and language at model's discretion, fitting 跨境电商 promotional context)
Constraints: must preserve visual complexity without clutter — layered type stacking and subject-over-text overlap are structural requirements
Avoid: flat, sparse, or minimalist layouts; chaotic or unreadable compositions
